business_hours.days: Monday to Saturday (7 days in summer, May to September), Monday to Friday (October to April) with Saturday 9 AM to 1 PM year-round
business_hours.start: 7:00 AM (May to September), 8:00 AM (October to April), 9:00 AM (Saturdays year-round)
business_hours.end: 8:00 PM (May to September), 5:00 PM (October to April), 1:00 PM (Saturdays year-round)

non_emergency_routing_rules: message only, next business day callback

call_transfer_rules.if_transfer_fails: tell the caller we'll call back in 30 minutes

integration_constraints: do not create ServiceTitan job for commercial refrigeration clients
do not create ServiceTitan job for pool equipment clients
after_hours_flow_summary: message only, next business day callback for non-emergencies
notes: always confirm caller's address, prioritize residential emergencies in summer, confirm service zone within 35 miles of Phoenix before proceeding, when instructing caller to go somewhere cool, specify 'please go to a neighbor's home, a nearby store, or a public library'
